project_type: Python MCP security monitoring system with ML classification, sandbox isolation, DPI proxy, honeypots, and audit logging
verification_instructions: Run pytest tests/ to validate code, run python -c 'from mcp_monitor.defense10 import orchestrator10' to verify imports
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install packages from PyPI
key_patterns: Dataclass-based result objects, regex-based detection, scikit-learn ML pipeline, Docker subprocess isolation, hash-chained audit log
directory_structure: src/mcp_monitor/ contains defense10/ (core ML+sandbox+DPI), detectors/ (regex-based), audit/ (hash chain + WAL), redteam/ (attack catalog)
